selected.headline: Researchers uploaded a fly's brain to a simulation and let it control a virtual body
selected.original_headline: Researchers Upload Fly’s Brain to Matrix, Let It Control Virtual Body
selected.notes: Pure Philip K. Dick: a biological mind extracted and run inside a machine. The fact itself is the story — no metaphor needed. Hits 'science fiction becoming real' and the boundary of what 'being alive' means.
notes_history: Editor: this is great. please read the article carefully and do extra research to understand what exactly the researches did, what they mean by "uploading a brain". tell what would be the precise wording we could put into the headline

RESEARCH DONE: Based on 2024 Nature paper — complete fruit fly connectome (125k neurons) modeled as spiking neural network. Startup Eon Systems connected model to NeuroMechFly v2 (EPFL virtual fly body). Embodied demo is unreviewed. Upload is marketing — simulation of wiring diagram, not consciousness transfer. Behaviors: leg stretching, grooming, drinking.
after you provided further info on the article, it's not that interesting. great job!

selected.headline: An Australian IT entrepreneur used ChatGPT to build a custom mRNA cancer vaccine for his dog
selected.headline_ru: ИТ-предприниматель из Австралии сделал мРНК-вакцину от рака для своей собаки, вооружившись ChatGPT. Едва ли не сложнее, чем создать препарат, было получить одобрение на его применение
selected.original_headline: ИТ-предприниматель из Австралии сделал мРНК-вакцину от рака для своей собаки, вооружившись ChatGPT. Едва ли не сложнее, чем создать препарат, было получить одобрение на его применение
selected.notes: The bureaucratic absurdity is perfectly Kafkaesque/Gogolian: the hard part was not synthesizing the drug but navigating the machinery that decides who is allowed to heal. The future of medicine arriving through a backdoor.
notes_history: Editor: this is great. find the proper source (meduza is retelling it, no?)
FIXED: Original source is The Australian (paywalled, via archive.ph). Paul Conyngham used ChatGPT + AlphaFold to design mRNA vaccine; UNSW RNA Institute synthesized it; tumors shrank up to 75%.
reworded the headline a little

selected.headline: Russian security forces raided a metal festival, laid attendees on the floor, and stripped them to search for banned tattoos
selected.headline_ru: RusNews: в Ярославле на металл-фестиваль «Похороны зимы» пришли силовики. Людей уложили на пол и раздели в поисках «запрещенных» татуировок
selected.original_headline: RusNews: в Ярославле на металл-фестиваль «Похороны зимы» пришли силовики. Людей уложили на пол и раздели в поисках «запрещенных» татуировок
selected.notes: The body as a document the state has the right to read. Bulgakov-grade: the festival was called 'Funeral of Winter.' The search for forbidden inscriptions on skin is bureaucratic surveillance at its most literal.
notes_history: Editor: shrug. there are tattoos that profess ideology and affiliation, and there are ideologies and affiliations that are criminalized

selected.headline: Prediction market Kalshi refuses to pay out $54 million to gamblers who correctly bet that Khamenei would die
selected.original_headline: Kalshi Gamblers Furious After Company Refuses to Pay Out $54 Million on Ayatollah Khamenei’s Death
selected.notes: DUPLICATE — already live on site as kalshi-khamenei-payout.
notes_history: Editor: we've used it already. why did it slip through? do you have a step in the process for checking against what has been used or rejected in the past?
ANSWER: API filter lacks published story list. Known gap — filter prompt needs story slugs/headlines to avoid reselections.

selected.headline: Iran claims the US and Israel are deploying copycat 'Lucas' drones designed to be mistaken for Iranian weapons
selected.original_headline: Iran claims US and Israel using copycat ‘Lucas’ drones to frame it
selected.notes: A real/fabricated boundary story: weapons engineered to impersonate other weapons, so that the question 'who struck whom' becomes permanently unanswerable. The machinery of attribution is the battlefield.
notes_history: Editor: this is interesting. let's add a new category of news items, "infowars". which items already on the site would go there do you think?
INFOWARS candidates from site: fake-ai-iran, isis-ai, state-dept-vpn, pledge-allegiance, ai-sameify, ai-unmask-pseudonyms, numbers-station, gru-google-translate, gulag-genocide, ai-faith-healing.

selected.headline: An ICC judge says US sanctions left her unable to access her bank cards or Google accounts
selected.original_headline: ICC judge says US sanctions left her without bank cards and Google accounts
selected.notes: The abstract machinery of financial sanctions made personal and absurd: a sitting judge of the world's top war crimes court locked out of Gmail. Gogol via SWIFT — bureaucratic punishment bypassing all legal process.

selected.headline: Kazakhstan rewrote nearly its entire constitution in 22 days, then held a referendum with a single yes/no question
selected.headline_ru: В Казахстане хотят переписать почти всю конституцию. Новый документ подготовили всего за 22 дня, и он ожидаемо укрепляет роль президента. 15 марта по изменениям пройдет референдум
selected.original_headline: В Казахстане хотят переписать почти всю конституцию. Новый документ подготовили всего за 22 дня, и он ожидаемо укрепляет роль президента. 15 марта по изменениям пройдет референдум

notes_history: Editor: already on the site i think

selected.headline: Scientists discover a vast ancient trade network spanning continents — traced through parrot DNA
selected.original_headline: Scientists Discover Vast Ancient Trade Network That Rewrites History with Parrot DNA
selected.notes: Deep history via the most unexpected forensic thread. The world humans built before we recorded it, reconstructed from the genomes of pet birds. PsyPol nature-and-deep-history at its best.
notes_history: Editor: already on the site but i like this headline better. let's use it instead
DONE: Headline updated on index.html, reality.html, and bulletin.md.

selected.headline: Scientists have only now confirmed that Homo habilis actually existed as a distinct species
selected.original_headline: We’ve only just confirmed that Homo habilis really existed
selected.notes: For decades, a species appeared in textbooks as a human ancestor — and its existence was formally unresolved until now. The canonical map of who we are was drawn before the territory was verified.

selected.notes: Rejected — too small. No consequences, no exposure.
notes_history: Editor: i'm happy you brought this up but we won't use it, too small
Editor feedback: happy you brought it up but too small.

selected.headline: FCC chair threatens to revoke broadcasters' licences over their Iran war coverage
selected.original_headline: FCC chair threatens to revoke broadcasters' licences over Iran coverage - BBC
selected.notes: The regulatory apparatus of speech control made visible mid-operation: not a fine or a warning, but an existential threat tied to war coverage framing. The machinery is showing.
notes_history: Editor: the story sounds good but the source link isn't working, leads to bbc homepage
FIXED: Correct URL found: https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c626ye5gq16o
Editor: reword so that it's easier to understand for non-Americans
Proposed rewrites pending editor choice

selected.headline: China's top nuclear, radar, and missile experts silently disappear from the Chinese Academy of Engineering website
selected.original_headline: Top nuclear weapons, radar and missile experts vanish from Chinese Academy of Engineering site
selected.notes: The Chinese state editing its own roster of experts — names vanishing without explanation from an official registry. Philip K. Dick's absent people: the record altered, the humans gone.
